{{Quote|Well, if it isn't the lovely and talented—GAAAH!|Tycho Celchu, expecting to see [[Winter Celchu|Winter]]|<ref name="X-Wing 9">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 9|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 9]]</ref>}}
'''Betsi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] [[Prostitute/Legends|prostitute]].

During [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] search for [[Eidolon (Strike-class)|''Eidolon'']] and its weapons cache, Betsi attempted to pick up [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] outside the [[Darklighter estate]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Luckily, [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] stepped in to save Celchu from the embarrassment.
